acceptance_criteria: latest preview opens locally and remains reviewable
visual hierarchy remains strong enough for operator reading
no critical regression against preserved v4-v16 behavior
evidence remains accessible after progressive disclosure
candidate is strong enough for future CRISOL preparation without applying transition now
warn_criteria: candidate is broadly acceptable but carries minor visual or clarity issues
non-blocking mobile, navigation or microcopy friction exists
warns can be documented without invalidating the candidate review outcome
rework_criteria: visual hierarchy is weak or confusing
operator trust or readability is not sufficient for future CRISOL preparation
must-fix issues require a targeted visual rework prompt
blocked_criteria: an external or technical blocker prevents decision
decision would be speculative without additional clarification

next_step_by_decision.ACCEPT: prepare a future candidate transition packet for CRISOL without applying any transition in this phase
next_step_by_decision.ACCEPT_WITH_WARN: record warns and decide whether they must be corrected before future CRISOL preparation
next_step_by_decision.REJECT_FOR_REWORK: open a specific visual rework prompt scoped to the observed failures
next_step_by_decision.BLOCKED: stop and register the blocker explicitly before any next action
